'''''UFC 322: Della Maddalena vs. Makhachev''''' (branded as '''''VeChain UFC 322''''' for sponsorship reasons) was a [[mixed martial arts]] event produced by the [[Ultimate Fighting Championship]] that took place on November 15, 2025, at [[Madison Square Garden]] in [[New York City, New York]], United States.<ref name="NY">{{Cite web|url=https://www.sportsnet.ca/ufc/article/two-champion-vs-champion-fights-to-headline-ufc-322-in-new-york/|title=Two champion vs. champion fights to headline UFC 322 in New York|publisher=sportsnet.ca|author=Mike Johnston|date=2025-08-28|access-date=2025-08-29}}</ref>

==Background==
The event marked the promotion's 12th visit to New York City and first since [[UFC 309]] in November 2024.<ref name="NY"/>

A [[UFC Welterweight Championship]] bout between current champion [[Jack Della Maddalena]] and former [[UFC Lightweight Championship|UFC Lightweight Champion]] [[Islam Makhachev]] headlined the event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/08/28/ufc-322-jack-della-maddalena-vs-islam-makhachev-new-york/85867955007/|title=UFC 322 main event announced: Jack Della Maddalena vs. Islam Makhachev|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Nolan King|date=2025-08-28|access-date=2025-08-28}}</ref> Makhachev vacated his lightweight title in May in order to move up to welterweight.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmamania.com/2025/5/13/24429594/dana-white-drops-ufc-317-fight-ilia-topuria-vs-charles-oliveira-headlines-vacant-lightweight-title|title=Vegas heat! Dana White drops UFC 317 fight card - Ilia Topuria vs. Charles Oliveira headlines for vacant lightweight title|publisher=mmamania.com|author=Alexander Behunin|date=2025-05-13|access-date=2025-05-13}}</ref>

In addition, a [[UFC Women's Flyweight Championship]] bout between current two-time champion [[Valentina Shevchenko]] and former two-time [[UFC Women's Strawweight Championship|UFC Women's Strawweight Champion]] [[Zhang Weili]] co-headlined the event. Zhang vacated her strawweight title in October in order to challenge for the flyweight title.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/08/28/ufc-322-valetina-shevchenko-vs-zhang-weili-new-york/85869503007/|title=UFC champ vacates title for super-fight showdown; contenders to fight for vacant title|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Nolan King|date=2025-08-28|access-date=2025-08-28}}</ref>

A bantamweight bout between Malcolm Wellmaker and Serhiy Sidey was scheduled for this event.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://bloodyelbow.com/2025/10/09/10-0-ufc-rising-star-gets-his-wish-to-fight-on-jack-della-maddalena-vs-islam-makhachev-card-at-msg/|title=10-0 UFC rising star gets his wish to fight on Jack Della Maddalena vs Islam Makhachev card at MSG|publisher=bloodyelbow.com|author=Harvey Leonard|date=2025-10-09|access-date=2025-10-09}}</ref> However, Sidey withdrew due to a shoulder injury and was replaced by Cody Haddon.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/10/13/ufc-322-serhiy-sidey-injured-malcolm-wellmaker/86680868007/|title=UFC 322: Serhiy Sidey out of matchup vs. Malcolm Wellmaker|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Matthew Wells and Nolan King|date=2025-10-13|access-date=2025-10-13}}</ref><ref>{{Cite web|url=https://mmajunkie.usatoday.com/story/sports/ufc/2025/10/16/prospect-malcolm-wellmaker-gets-new-opponent-for-ufc-322/86728172007|title=Prospect Malcolm Wellmaker gets new opponent for UFC 322|publisher=mmajunkie.usatoday.com|author=Danny Segura, Mike Bohn and Nolan King|date=2025-10-16|access-date=2025-10-16}}</ref> Two days before the event, Haddon also withdrew due to an injury and was replaced by promotional newcomer Ethyn Ewing. The bout was subsequently shifted to the featherweight division.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/ufc/456002/ufc-322-malcolm-wellmaker-gets-new-opponent-on-just-2-days-notice|title=UFC 322: Malcolm Wellmaker gets new opponent on just 2 days' notice|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Damon Martin|date=2025-11-14|access-date=2025-11-14}}</ref>

At the weigh-ins, [[Beneil Dariush]] weighed in at 157.2 pounds, 1.2 pounds over the lightweight non-title fight limit. The bout proceeded at catchweight and he was fined 25 percent of his purse, which went to his opponent [[Benoît Saint Denis]].<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmafighting.com/ufc/456088/ufc-322-weigh-in-results-championship-fights-set-1-veteran-misses|title=UFC 322 weigh-in results: Championship fights set, 1 veteran misses|publisher=mmafighting.com|author=Alexander K. Lee|date=2025-11-14|access-date=2025-11-14}}</ref>

== Bonus awards ==
The following fighters received $50,000 bonuses.<ref>{{Cite web|url=https://www.mmamania.com/ufc-bonuses-and-awards/403053/official-ufc-322-post-fight-bonus-winners-results-espn-ppv-new-york-prates-morales-nickal-saint-denis|title=Bonuses! Prates, Morales lead $50k winners with statement knockouts - UFC 322|publisher=mmamania.com|author=Dan Hiergesell|date=2025-11-16|access-date=2025-11-16}}</ref>
*'''Fight of the Night:''' No bonus awarded.
*'''Performance of the Night: Michael Morales''', '''Carlos Prates''', '''Benoît Saint Denis''', and '''Bo Nickal'''
